Inmate Brown ADC#201145 in 2 Barracks refusing orders to lock down
~9:40pm
Sgt Peterman gave 3 direct orders to cuff up — Brown ignored all
Brown punched Sgt Peterman in face — split lip, bleeding
Cpl Powell & Cpl Sohns responded to assist
Brown wrestled to ground, cuffed by Cpl Powell
Brown said "fuck you, I ain't going nowhere, you can't make me"
Sgt Peterman seen by Infirmary — cleaned wound, no sutures needed
Company Nurse called (877) 854-6877 — confirmation #CN-20260721-8823
Officer Accident Report completed by Sgt Peterman
Brown escorted to Restrictive Housing by Cpl Powell & Cpl Sohns
Lt Roberts notified 9:45pm
Photos taken of Sgt Peterman injuries
Brown refused medical
Video footage requested from Master Control — Sgt Williams reviewing
